overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, walking through an industrial zone at dusk. The player approaches a modified yellow car with graffiti, examines the surroundings, passes dead bodies near warehouses, walks past large storage tanks, and emerges onto a road with passing traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial vehicle yard with abandoned cars and debris

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial lot toward a modified yellow car

notable_agents.action: dead body lying on the ground next to the yellow car

entered.detail: large concrete industrial building with multiple garage bays
tall billboard with purple neon frame and advertisement
large metal electrical transmission tower with multiple crossbars
heavily modified yellow car with roof rack and checkerboard bumper
corpse lying face down near the front of the yellow vehicle

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide industrial yard at dusk, with the camera approaching a modified yellow car. A dead body lies near the vehicle, and industrial buildings, billboards, and power pylons frame the background. The atmosphere is desolate and quiet.

scene_state.functional_zone: warehouse loading area with parked van and scattered cargo

events.description: approaching a dead body with a red medkit box lying nearby

agents.ego_description: walking past the yellow car and through the warehouse area, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: dead body lying in a pool of blood next to a red medkit

entered.detail: grey panel van parked near the warehouse loading bay
stack of cardboard boxes on a wooden pallet with orange straps
corpse lying near warehouse entrance with red and white medkit box

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the yellow car, the camera walks through the warehouse area, passing a grey van and cargo pallets. At 30 seconds, the player approaches a dead body with a medkit near the warehouse entrance. The industrial warehouse building shifts from the center to the left of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial tank farm with large storage silos

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial storage tanks and graffiti-covered walls

entered.detail: cluster of large cylindrical white storage tanks with rust stains and ladders
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags including 'MILSTRN'
derelict green vehicle parked near the tank fence
large metal pipes and walkways spanning across the area

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an industrial tank farm area dominated by large white storage silos. The camera walks past graffiti-covered walls and abandoned vehicles, with industrial piping visible overhead. The warehouse and previous dead body are left behind as the environment opens up.

events.description: multiple vehicles including a military truck and sedan drive past on the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the roadside curb as vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving along the road past the camera

entered.detail: paved two-lane road with yellow dividing lines and white edge markings
elevated highway or walkway spanning across the road ahead
distant buildings with illuminated signs and orange neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment emerges onto a paved road with active traffic. Vehicles including a red sedan and military truck pass by as the camera walks along the curb. An overpass bridge spans the road ahead, with neon-lit buildings visible in the distant background, transitioning from the enclosed industrial yard to a more open urban thoroughfare.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate industrial yard that gradually opens into a bustling urban thoroughfare at dusk. It begins by approaching a modified yellow car and a nearby body amidst a backdrop of billboards and power pylons. As the camera moves away from the vehicle, the scene shifts through a warehouse area past cargo pallets and another body with a medkit, with the industrial buildings sliding toward the left of the frame. The environment then expands into a tank farm dominated by large white storage silos and overhead piping, passing graffiti-covered walls and abandoned vehicles. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosed yard onto a paved road, walking along the curb past a red sedan and military truck toward a distant skyline of neon-lit buildings and an overpass bridge.
